source: Real inbox sample (Gmail thread 19ca04c13eba0611, 2026-02-27), Tesla Service Appointment Update from noreply@tesla.com

input.subject: Tesla Service Appointment Update
input.bodyTruncated: Service Appointment Update. Your Model S service appointment has been moved to March 2, 2026 2:30 PM at the Tesla Service Clermont-State Road Service Center. Vehicle Model S 5YJSA1E10GF156306. Service Center: Tesla Service Clermont-State Road, 16455 State Road 50, Clermont, FL 34711. View in app to confirm or reschedule.

expected.title: Tesla Model S service appointment
expected.location: Tesla Service Clermont-State Road, 16455 State Road 50, Clermont, FL 34711

notes: Reschedule notification — 'has been moved to' phrasing indicates an update to an existing event. Extractor should pull the NEW time; signature/match downstream is responsible for detecting the existing calendar event and treating this as an update rather than a new create.
